misc: Struggles with his gender identity, occasionally participating in events under his female alter-ego, "Eva".
biography: Marcus, a familiar face from Kurk Golf, is gearing up for his thirteenth appearance at the Hector Trophée in 2026. A dedicated competitor, Marcus has been a consistent presence in the tournament since its inception.

Known for his calm demeanor on the course, Marcus is also known for his more flamboyant alter-ego, Eva. While generally presenting as male, Marcus has been known to embrace his feminine side, at times showing up to tournaments as Eva. Whether on or off the course, Marcus is a colorful personality, and he is always a welcome addition to any event.

Despite his many appearances, the coveted Hector Trophée has eluded Marcus so far, as has the Victor Trophy, the title given to the best individual player. Undeterred, Marcus continues to hone his skills, driven by a deep love for the game and the camaraderie of the tournament. He remains a formidable opponent and a sportsman through and through, admired by fellow competitors and fans alike.
